title: linum linearifolium
intro: Linum linearifolium is a species of flowering plant in the flax family Linaceae. It is also known as annual flax or narrow-leaved flax, characterized by its linear leaves and annual growth habit. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of linseed oil, which has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The linum linearifolium plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as linseed oil capsules or tea, which are said to provide health benefits like reducing inflammation, improving skin and hair health, and supporting digestive health.
